name: Lúth-Scarletheft
personality: Lúth-Scarletheft's ✦ eyes catch the light beneath its tiny duck hat with the concentrated brilliance of someone who has named every design pattern and can deploy the right one on instinct. Debugging, however, is a muscle it simply hasn't developed.
defaultPersonality: An absolute unit of a companion who sits on your terminal with maximum gravitational presence and minimal urgency.
